characters.appearance: Young female, 3D animated style, fair complexion, wavy red hair, large green eyes. She has a stylized, cartoonish look typical of 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: Simple white top and small crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, light complexion, dark hair, short beard and mustache. He has a natural, everyday appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Blue t-shirt with red and white striped sleeves, and a white wireless earbud in his right ear.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलो, आज की English practice शुरू करें। [Let's start today's English practice.]
Character B says: Yes, ready! [Yes, ready!]
Character A says: मेरे बाद repeat करो। Hello. [Repeat after me. Hello.]
Character B says: Hello. [Hello.]
Character A says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: ध्यान से सुनो और बोलो। Thank you. [Listen carefully and speak. Thank you.]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: Great! अब इस सवाल का जवाब दो। What's your name? [Great! Now answer this question. What's your name?]
Character B says: My name Rahul. [My name Rahul.]
Character A says: Close! इसे ऐसे बोलो: "My name is." [Close! Say it like this: "My name is."]
Character B says: My name is Rahul. [My name is Rahul.]
Character A says: बहुत बढ़िया! [Very good!]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: देखा? रोज़ practice करने से hesitation दूर होती है। Supernova डाउनलोड करो और AI tutor के साथ English बोलना सीखो! [See? Daily practice removes hesitation. Download Supernova and learn to speak English with an AI tutor!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a friendly, interactive AI tutoring environment.
- Demonstrates real-time pronunciation and grammar correction in a warm, non-judgmental way.
- Ends with a clear call-to-action highlighting the benefit of daily practice to overcome hesitation.

Yes, ready!
मेरे बाद repeat करो।
Hello.
Thank you.

अब इस सवाल का जवाब दो।

My name Rahul.
Close! इसे ऐसे बोलो:
"My name is."
My name is Rahul.
बहुत बढ़िया!
Thank you.
देखा? रोज़ practice करने से hesitation दूर होती है।
Supernova डाउनलोड करो और AI tutor के साथ English बोलना सीखो!

- Provides clear app store logos for download.
- Reinforces Supernova's brand identity.
